title: Terms and conditions
content:
## Terms and conditions , Ngā ture me ngā here
Learn about the terms and conditions that apply when you use Tahatū Career Navigator.

## Who the terms and conditions apply to E hāngai ana ngā ture me ngā here ki a wai ,
These terms and conditions apply to you as a user of Tahatū Career Navigator, and to us as the owner of Tahatū Career Navigator.
When we say ‘we’ or ‘us’, we mean the Tertiary Education Commission Te Amorangi Mātauranga Matua (TEC). We are the New Zealand Government agency that runs Tahatū.

## Who you are Ko wai koe ,
As a user of Tahatū who has an account, you acknowledge that you are at least 13 years of age or have permission from your guardian to use to the website.

## Why have terms and conditions? He aha te take o ngā ture me ngā here? ,
These terms and conditions explain what we expect from you, and what you can expect from us when you use Tahatū. They give us both some protection in law if one of us isn’t following the rules.
We may give you additional terms and conditions in some situations. For example, there are different terms and conditions for using our API. If we have given you any additional terms, you must also follow those rules.

## Browsing and accessing content Te tirotiro me te uru ki ngā kiko ,
Tahatū enables you to browse and search for and access our and third parties' content.
The Our data page contains more information on where our content comes from and the licences that apply to that content.
Some of our content is sourced from a third party under a public licence, like Creative Commons.
The Our data page attributes the source of that content and includes links to where you can access the original.
The Using our content page tells you which parts of our website content you can copy and reuse, and which parts you cannot copy and reuse.
The requirements set out on the Our data page and the Using our content page are part of these terms and conditions.

### Links to third party websites and CV builders Ngā pūhanga tāhuhu kōrero kiritoru ,
Tahatū includes links to third party websites including CV builders run by other organisations. You use these websites and services at your own risk.
TEC does not have any control over these websites or third-party platforms. Although we include the links, this doesn’t mean we recommend or endorse these services. We make no guarantee about the quality, accuracy or reliability of their services.
TEC is not responsible for any loss, damage or issues arising from your use of these third-party sites.
These providers may collect your personal information. You should carefully review their privacy policies before sharing any personal information.
If you experience any problems with a third-party CV builder, contact the relevant provider directly.

## Disclaimer Kupu karo ,
We created Tahatū to help you make career plans and decisions. We recommend you check out other information and services to help you make your decisions like career advisers, study and training providers, and professional and industry organisations. We cannot guarantee that all the information on our website is accurate and up to date.
We endeavour to take care in our maintenance of this website. You agree, however, that we will not be liable to you, on any legal basis (including negligence), for any loss or damage you suffer through your use of this website, its content or any content or website to which it is linked, except in those cases where the law does not allow us to exclude or limit our liability to you.

## What happens if you don’t meet our terms and conditions Ka ahatia mēnā kāore koe e tautuku ki ā mātou ture me ngā here ,
You are legally responsible for any loss or costs that arise from you not meeting these terms and conditions.
If you fail to meet these terms and conditions, we may suspend or cancel your use of Tahatū.

## Changes to terms and conditions Ngā panoni ki ngā ture me ngā here ,
We may change our terms and conditions and our privacy policy at any time, but we will tell you about any significant changes to these terms and conditions and our privacy policy before the change is made. By continuing to use Tahatū after a change, you agree to be bound by the amended terms and conditions.

## Your information Ō mōhiohio ,
We explain on our privacy page what personal information we collect when you use Tahatū and what we do with it. By using Tahatū, you accept our privacy policy too.

## Our information sources Ō mātou puna mōhiohio ,
Visit our data page to find out about the data we use on our web pages and in our tools.

## Contact us with your questions or concerns Whakapā mai me ō pātai, āwangawanga rānei ,
We're happy to answer your questions or concerns about our terms and conditions. You can use the link below to report a problem, call us on 0800 601 301 or email customerservice@tec.govt.nz .
These terms are governed by New Zealand law.
